allow: Bash(bash -c 'SKILLS_DIR=""$HOME/.claude/skills""; mkdir -p ""$SKILLS_DIR""; for skill in skills/*/; do skill_name=$\(basename ""$skill""\); if [ -f ""$skill/SKILL.md"" ]; then mkdir -p ""$SKILLS_DIR/$skill_name""; cp -r ""$skill""* ""$SKILLS_DIR/$skill_name/"" 2>/dev/null || true; echo ""Installed: $skill_name""; fi; done')
